insight: The "enchants too high" / over-enchanted item confiscation is not a settings.yml toggle but an active rule named `enchant-too-high` in `rules/main.rs` (around lines 205-211: `match *`, `name enchant-too-high`, `check enchant too-high`, `then confiscate`). To disable, delete or comment out those 4 lines and `/protect reload`. To raise the cap instead, add `ignore enchantlevel <level>` to the rule.
